content.text2: Community design challenge submission for Nothing Phone 3a
content.text3: Nothing launched a design challenge for the Phone 3a, inviting the community to reimagine the device's interface. My submission extends Nothing's minimal and retro aesthetic across interface elements, designing widgets, clocks, wallpapers, and a fingerprint unlock animation that feel cohesive with the brand.

I didn’t take first place in the software category, but it was a fun project to explore. I learned a lot from the other participants, especially how simple and effective the winning submission was. A good reminder that simplicity really is key.
